title: selaginella cavernaria
intro: Selaginella cavernaria, also known as cave spikemoss, is a species of spikemoss that belongs to the family Selaginellaceae, a group of ancient, vascular plants that thrive in tropical and subtropical regions. Traditionally, Selaginella cavernaria has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which can help to treat various health conditions such as fever, cough, and skin irritations. The plant is rich in compounds like flavonoids and phenolic acids, which contribute to its health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and boosting the immune system. Selaginella cavernaria can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infused oil, making it a versatile herbal remedy for various health needs.
